attribution.programCommittee: Reviewed by the CAISc 2026 Program Committee

problems.title: Hadamard Maximal Determinant
problems.subtitle: Choose an n, build an n x n matrix of +1s and -1s, and try to beat the current determinant record.

problems.title: Conway's 99-Graph
problems.subtitle: Build a graph on 99 vertices satisfying srg(99, 14, 1, 2). $1,000 prize, unsolved since 1971.

problems.title: Matrix Multiplication Tensor Rank
problems.subtitle: Find a way to multiply matrices using fewer scalar multiplications than the current record.

problems.title: Connected Still Life
problems.subtitle: Maximize live cells in a stable, connected Game of Life pattern inside an n x n box.

problems.title: HP Protein Folding
problems.subtitle: Fold an HP chain on a 2D lattice to maximize hydrophobic contacts. NP-hard with open records since the 1990s.
